components.limitation: Coefficient-level contraction in the complete bundle connection is not derived.
Boundary functional curvature is action-linked but not fully action-derived.
Chirality action is scaffold-controlled, not a full curvature theorem.
Sector off-diagonal curvature coefficients are not derived from the complete connection.
Only safe if the curvature contraction is proven PSD/profile-controlled.
The complete mixed bundle-curvature formula/action is not specified.

limitations: The Lichnerowicz structure is formalized but the complete mixed curvature contraction is not derived.
No harmless classification follows until the missing connection-curvature formula is supplied.
remainder_formula: R_bundle = c(F_BH) - (V_Hopf + V_boundary + V_chi + K_sector + V_PSD represented curvature contractions)
title: BHSM v2.8 Curvature Remainder Formula Report
